title: Sweetener
notes:
Issued in a gatefold jacket with paper inner sleeves.

Hype sticker on front shrink-wrap.

Printed and manufactured in the USA.
All song titles listed in lower case on release, except R.E.M. and God is a woman.

Track 1 Recorded at MXM Studios, LA, Los Angeles, CA, US
Tracks 2, 11 Recorded at Chalice Recording Studios, Hollywood, CA, and Conway Recording Studios, Hollywood, CA; Mixed at Callanwolde Fine Arts Center, Atlanta, GA
Track 3 Recorded at Glenwood Place Studios, Burbank, CA; Jungle City Studios, New York, NY; Chalice Recording Studios, Hollywood, CA; The Lunchtable, Los Angeles, CA, and Conway Recording Studios, Hollywood, CA
Track 4 Recorded at Midnight Blue Studios, Miami, FL; and Conway Recording Studios, Hollywood, CA; Mixed at Callanwolde Fine Arts Center, Atlanta, GA
Track 6 Recorded at MXM Studios, LA, Los Angeles, CA, US (Sam Holland, Cory Bice) and Wolf Cousins Studios, Stockholm, SE
Track 7 Recorded at South Beach Studios, Miami Beach, FL, and Chalice Recording Studios, Hollywood, CA; Mixed at Callanwolde Fine Arts Center, Atlanta, GA
Track 8 Recorded at Chalice Recording Studios, Hollywood, CA; East West Studios, Hollywood, CA; Glenwood Place Studios, Burbank, CA; The Lunchtable, Los Angeles, CA; and Conway Recording Studios, Hollywood, CA; Mixed at Callanwolde Fine Arts Center, Atlanta, GA
Track 9 Recorded at MXM Studios, LA, Los Angeles, CA, US (Sam Holland, Cory Bice, Jeremy Lertola, Noah Passovoy) and Wolf Cousins Studios, Stockholm, SE
Track 10 Recorded at MXM Studios, LA, Los Angeles, CA, US (Sam Holland, Cory Bice, Jeremy Lertola) and Wolf Cousins Studios, Stockholm, SE; Mixed at MixStar Studios, Virginia Beach, VA
Track 12 Recorded at District 4-12 Studios, Northridge, CA, US
Track 15 Recorded at Chalice Recording Studios, Hollywood, CA; Mixed at Callanwolde Fine Arts Center, Atlanta, GA

Track 10 Produced for MXM Productions & for Wolf Cousins Productions

℗ & © 2018 Republic Records, a division of UMG Recordings, Inc.
Distributed by Universal Music Distribution.
